title: Kosullar (if/unless/case)
subtitle: Kosullu ifadeler ve case-when.
code:
score = 78

if score >= 90
  grade = "AA"
elsif score >= 70
  grade = "BA"
elsif score >= 50
  grade = "CC"
else
  grade = "FF"
end

puts "Not: #{score} -> Harf notu: #{grade}"

# case/when (switch benzeri)
day = 3

day_name = case day
           when 1 then "Pazartesi"
           when 2 then "Sali"
           when 3 then "Carsamba"
           else "Bilinmeyen gun"
           end

puts "Gun: #{day_name}"

# Ternary benzeri (if ifade olarak)
number = 7
parity = number.even? ? "Cift" : "Tek"
puts "\n#{number} sayisi #{parity}"

# unless kullanimi
age = 20
unless age < 18
  puts "\nReşit"
end

# Tek satirlik if (modifier)
puts "Pozitif sayi" if number > 0
